title: Economics telemetry ingest response — initial ingest (HTTP 201)
description: The HTTP 201 response: the first ingest of a batch under its idempotency key, where state was written now. Identical to the base ingest response in every field, and additionally binds replayed = false. Individual events may still have been rejected — read counts and rejections — but the batch itself was not a replay. Making the flag a per-status const closes the disagreement in the contract: a 201 that carried replayed:true would claim 'nothing was written' on the exact path where state was.

replayed.description: Bound false on the 201 initial-ingest path: this response reflects state written now, not a replay.
